meaning: n.占卜者,语意含混的预言家
examples: And unless you're Nostradamus, this is a formidable challenge.
These and other channels show Nostradamus programs more regularly than they show microscopes and telescopes combined.
History (720p) has Nostradamus Effect at 9 p.m. and MysteryQuest at 10 p.m.
Again, investors were more Nostradumbus than Nostradamus.
